title: SeniorLegend FPS Boost - Mobile Edition
description: This is modpack which will boost your fps in minecraft latest 1.21.11 version and it's a pure and highly fps focused modpack for mobile (Mojolauncher/Pojav/Zalith) etc.
body:
SeniorLegend FPS Boosted Modpack (1.21.11)

SeniorLegend FPS Boosted Modpack is a highly optimized, lightweight, and performance-focused Minecraft modpack designed specially for low-end devices, mobile launchers (Pojav, MojoLauncher, Zalith, etc.), and weak hardware.

This modpack is built for Minecraft 1.21.11 and focuses on pure FPS boost, smooth gameplay, and reduced lag without breaking vanilla gameplay.

🔥 Why this modpack gives HIGH FPS?

This modpack improves performance by:

✅ Optimizing rendering engine

✅ Reducing unnecessary calculations

✅ Improving chunk loading & lighting

✅ Optimizing entity & XP handling

✅ Reducing overdraw (leaves, particles, visuals)

✅ Removing background lag sources

All mods included are FPS-verified, safe, and tested for performance impact.

⚡ Key Features

🚀 Massive FPS Boost

🪶 Ultra Lightweight (No heavy mods)

📱 Mobile Friendly

🧠 Smart performance optimizations

🌿 Optimized leaves & visuals

🧱 Stable for Survival & Multiplayer

❌ No unnecessary content mods

❌ No shaders or heavy resource usage

📱 Best For

Low-end phones & PCs

PojavLauncher / MojoLauncher / Zalith users

Players facing:
Lag
Stutters
FPS drops
Heating issues
Survival & PvP players who want smooth gameplay

🧩 Modpack Philosophy

This is NOT a feature-heavy modpack.
This is a PURE PERFORMANCE MODPACK.

Every mod is added only if:

It improves FPS

It does NOT reduce performance

It stays close to vanilla Minecraft

🛠️ Minecraft Version
✅ 1.21.11

Loader: (Optimized for modern performance loaders)

👑 Created By -
SeniorLegend

Built with performance in mind, tested on low-end devices, and optimized for real gameplay — not just numbers.

⚠️ Important Notes

Use default or low graphics settings for best results

Do NOT add heavy shaders

Works best with optimized launchers

⭐ If this modpack helped you:

Give it a Like on Modrinth

Share with friends

Support the project
